records.question: Which third-party companies have maintenance engineers whose last name is exactly Hirthe?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Hirthe'
records.pred_sql: select third_party_companies.company_id from third_party_companies join maintenance_engineers on third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id where maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'hirthe' limit 5;
records.thought: To find third-party companies with maintenance engineers whose last name is exactly 'Hirthe', join Third_Party_Companies with Maintenance_Engineers on company_id and filter by last_name = 'Hirthe'.

records.question: What suppliers located at 9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753 with other company details exactly Kiribati have maintenance contracts starting on or before 2017-05-14 11:57:50 and ending on or after 2018-03-23 17:29:21, and supply assets where asset_details is monitor1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50' AND assets.asset_details = 'monitor1' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
records.pred_sql:
select distinct third_party_companies.company_id
from third_party_companies
join maintenance_contracts on maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id = third_party_companies.company_id
join assets on assets.supplier_company_id = third_party_companies.company_id
where lower(third_party_companies.company_address) like '%9405 leffler hollow apt. 753%'
  and lower(third_party_companies.other_company_details) = 'kiribati'
  and maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50'
  and maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21'
  and lower(assets.asset_details) like '%monitor1%'
limit 5
records.thought: Filter third_party_companies by address and other details, join with maintenance_contracts to check contract dates, and join with assets to filter by asset_details 'monitor1'.

records.question: Which Maintenance Contractor company named White Ltd is located at 680 Hammes Ways and associated with Niue?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
WHERE third_party_companies.company_type = 'Maintenance Contractor' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Niue' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '680 Hammes Ways' AND third_party_companies.company_name = 'White Ltd'
records.pred_sql: select company_id from third_party_companies where lower(company_name) like '%white ltd%' and lower(company_address) like '%680 hammes ways%' and lower(company_type) like '%niue%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter third_party_companies by company_name, company_address, and company_type to find the maintenance contractor named 'White Ltd' located at '680 Hammes Ways' and associated with Niue.

records.question: Which third party companies are based at 5147 Raul Burg Apt. 623 and have other company details listed as Armenia?

WHERE third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Armenia' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '5147 Raul Burg Apt. 623'

records.question: Which third party companies are Suppliers with maintenance contracts ending on or after 2018-03-23 17:29:21?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
WHERE maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
records.pred_sql: select third_party_companies.company_id from third_party_companies join maintenance_contracts on maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id = third_party_companies.company_id where lower(third_party_companies.company_type) like '%supplier%' and maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' limit 5;
records.thought: To find third party companies that are suppliers and have maintenance contracts ending on or after the specified date, join Third_Party_Companies with Maintenance_Contracts and filter by company_type and contract_end_date.

records.question: Which third-party companies supply assets that are exactly machine1 made by RU and have maintenance contracts ending on or after 2018-02-27 05:03:22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE assets.asset_details = 'machine1' AND assets.asset_make = 'RU' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-02-27 05:03:22'
records.pred_sql:
select distinct third_party_companies.company_id
from third_party_companies
join assets on third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
join maintenance_contracts on assets.maintenance_contract_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_id
where lower(assets.asset_make) = 'machine1'
  and lower(assets.asset_model) = 'ru'
  and maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-02-27 05:03:22'
limit 5
records.thought: Filter assets by exact make 'machine1' and model 'ru', join with maintenance contracts having end date on or after the specified date, then select the supplier companies of those assets.

records.question: Which third-party companies named Rau, Ullrich and King are located at 5147 Raul Burg Apt. 623 and have a maintenance engineer named Manley Grady?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_engineers ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_engineers.company_id
WHERE maintenance_engineers.last_name = 'Grady' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '5147 Raul Burg Apt. 623' AND third_party_companies.company_name = 'Rau, Ullrich and King' AND maintenance_engineers.first_name = 'Manley'
records.pred_sql: select distinct tpc.company_id from third_party_companies tpc join maintenance_engineers me on tpc.company_id = me.company_id where (lower(tpc.company_name) like '%rau%' or lower(tpc.company_name) like '%ullrich%' or lower(tpc.company_name) like '%king%') and lower(tpc.company_address) like '%5147 raul burg apt. 623%' and lower(me.first_name) = 'manley' and lower(me.last_name) = 'grady' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter third_party_companies by company_name containing 'rau', 'ullrich', or 'king' and company_address containing '5147 raul burg apt. 623', then join with maintenance_engineers to find those with an engineer named 'manley grady'.

records.thought: Filter third_party_companies by name, address, and other details, then join with maintenance_contracts to filter contracts by start and end dates.

records.question: Which suppliers located at 9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753 have assets with model 91 ub and make CN that were disposed on or after 2018-03-10 11:11:43 and are under maintenance contracts ending on or after 2018-03-02 22:26:54?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON assets.maintenance_contract_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_id
WHERE assets.asset_model = '91 ub' AND assets.asset_make = 'CN' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-02 22:26:54' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753' AND assets.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-10 11:11:43'
records.pred_sql:
select distinct third_party_companies.company_id
from third_party_companies
join assets on assets.supplier_company_id = third_party_companies.company_id
join maintenance_contracts on assets.maintenance_contract_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_id
where lower(third_party_companies.company_address) like '%9405 leffler hollow apt. 753%'
  and lower(assets.asset_model) like '%91 ub%'
  and lower(assets.asset_make) like '%cn%'
  and assets.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-10 11:11:43'
  and maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-02 22:26:54'
limit 5
records.thought: Filter suppliers by address, join with assets filtered by model, make, and disposal date, then join with maintenance contracts filtered by contract end date, and select the company IDs.
